name: wrap-up
description: Claude Code plugin bundling two skills. /wrap-up ends a session: commits touched repos, then ensures and updates the four project files (_tracker.md, _prd.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md — all mandatory, auto-created from inline starters if missing), then reviews the session for memory writes. /init-project seeds those same four files interactively at project start. Self-contained, plain Markdown, no runtime.
author: tschenkster (Thomas Schenkelberg | https://www.linkedin.com/in/thomas-schenkelberg/)
